author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: bizlogic_inventory_oversell_race
summary: Detects inventory oversell race — N parallel add-to-cart calls each claim the same low-stock SKU.

args.--parallel: Number of parallel buyer accounts (default 6, capped by budget)
args.--product-id: Pin a specific product id; 0 = auto-discover stock=1 SKU
